name: VibeAround
description: Keep your AI coding agents around. Launch Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi Agent, and more from one place — side by side, connected, reachable, and ready to work across web, mobile, and messaging.
summaryZh: Keep your AI coding agents around. Launch Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi Agent, and more from one place — side by side, connected, reachable, and ready to work across web, mobile, and messaging. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
